title: GTS - End User Services, Workplace Technology Engineer, Engineering & Solutions, AVP
description:
Description of Responsibilities

  • Deploy, configure, and manage System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) for software distribution, operating system deployment, and patch management.

  • Monitor SCCM infrastructure for performance and reliability, troubleshooting issues as they arise.

  • Develop and maintain documentation for SCCM processes, configurations, and best practices.

  • Maintain SCCM infrastructure (site servers, DPs, boundaries).

  • Manage MacOS devices using JAMF Pro

  • Development of scripted procedures and automation of day-to-day common executed tasks in End User IT services and endpoint management operations in a large-scale enterprise environment.

  • Monitor, detect, remediate Mac devices health and risk issues, such as NAC posture, patch versions, and related security compliance gaps.

  • Analyse usability and security of third-party software, perform security scanning and functional tests to make sure the software is saft to be introduced into the environment.

  • Develop solutions that integrate with various platforms/applications via API for managing endpoint security and compliance, risks in onboarding and provisioning endpoints and self-remediation of endpoint issues, etc.

  • Participate in EUS projects including Base Release Image upgrades, Microsoft 365, MacOS optimisation, and implementation of virtual desktop environment.

  • Proactively engage internal business and other stakeholders to identify opportunities to improve digital workspace and overall endpoint security posture.

  • Address audit findings by refining existing processes and/or endpoint compliance policies.

  • Create and maintain OS deployment task sequences using SCCM

  • Monitor and troubleshoot software and patch deployments and managed manage hardware and software inventory collection.

  • Implement and monitor endpoint protection policies for Windows/Mac using Intune

  • Enforce compliance settings and configuration baselines and generate reports on software, hardware, and compliance

Job Qualifications/Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in IT and minimum 3 years’ experience in end user computing and desktop engineering role within a Banking or FI industry.

  • Hands-on experience with MacOS configurations and JAMF.

  • Strong, diverse technical skills, especially in the areas related to end user computing including Windows/Mac OS, Office O365 and software packaging.

  • Knowledge in risk management, MacOS vulnerabilities and mitigations.

  • Excellent communication, interpersonal and presentation skills.

  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skill with proven ability to work well in a technically challenging and multitasking environment.

  • Possess creativity, ingenuity, and willingness to challenge status quo.

  • A team oriented and team player.

postedCompany.description:
The longest-established Singapore bank, we’ve been helping people and businesses get what they want from life since 1932. How? By taking the time to truly understand their needs. And it starts with looking after our people. With a motivated, purpose-driven culture. Looking after your well-being. Providing continuous holistic growth. 


Today, we are on a journey of transformation. Pioneering banking solutions with a future-ready mindset. Unleashing the creativity and ambition of our people though the largest-of-its-kind open-learning program. Harnessing the power of seamless data and technology to create first-to-market products and services. Partnering with sustainability innovators. Financing green technologies. Working in close-knit collaborative teams. Where you feel included and in complete control of your career growth. Now and into the future. 


We are recognised as one of the World's Top 50 Safest Banks by Global Finance. And the best-managed bank in Singapore and Asia Pacific by The Asian Banker. From this foundation of financial strength and robust technology, we serve 3.5 million people across Asia. Our footprint covers over 1,000 branches throughout Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, China, Hong Kong and Macao.  


Now it's time to launch your career at the forefront of banking. Whether you want to innovate needs-based financial services. Find the best version of yourself in a friendly, supportive team. Build lasting value in your community. Help people grow their assets, business, and investments. Take your learning as far as you can. Or simply enjoy a vibrant, future-ready career, your Opportunity Starts Here.
postedCompany.name: OVERSEA-CHINESE BANKING CORPORATION LIMITED
